title: Analytical Chemistry: Techniques and Methods
author: Dr. Deepa Devendra Parab
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: "Analytical Chemistry Techniques and Methods" is designed for both undergraduate and postgraduate students in analytical chemistry, providing thorough discussions on key concepts and techniques. The book explores classical methods, including complexometric and redox titrations, along with a variety of spectroscopic and separation techniques, thermal analysis, nuclear methods, and critical topics such as quality assurance and method validation. This text aims to improve quantitative analytical problem-solving skills and build confidence in producing high-quality analytical data through hands-on laboratory training.
steps_raw: "Analytical Chemistry Techniques and Methods" is designed for both undergraduate and postgraduate students in analytical chemistry, providing thorough discussions on key concepts and techniques. The book explores classical methods, including complexometric and redox titrations, along with a variety of spectroscopic and separation techniques, thermal analysis, nuclear methods, and critical topics such as quality assurance and method validation. This text aims to improve quantitative analytical problem-solving skills and build confidence in producing high-quality analytical data through hands-on laboratory training.
